title: Harness Manifest
description: Schema for .harness-manifest.yml — declares how a downstream fork customizes the SAFe Agentic Workflow harness. All paths are relative to .claude/ (v2.7.0 scope).

manifest_version.description: Schema version for forward compatibility. Must be a semver-compatible string (e.g., '1.0').

identity.description: Project identity values matching the {{...}} placeholder names from scripts/setup-template.sh. These are used to build the substitution map during sync.

PROJECT_SHORT.description: Short name or acronym (e.g., 'REN'). Often matches TICKET_PREFIX.

COMPANY_NAME.description: Display name of the company or organization (e.g., 'ByBren, LLC').

AUTHOR_NAME.description: Full name of the primary author (e.g., 'J. Scott Graham').

ARCHITECT_GITHUB_HANDLE.description: GitHub handle of the project's architect / Stage 2 reviewer.

TICKET_PREFIX.description: Linear ticket prefix (e.g., 'REN'). Used in branch names and commit messages.

MAIN_BRANCH.description: Name of the main/default branch (e.g., 'main' or 'dev').

MCP_LINEAR_SERVER.description: MCP server name for Linear integration.

MCP_CONFLUENCE_SERVER.description: MCP server name for Confluence integration.

DB_CONTAINER.description: Docker container name for the database.

additionalProperties.description: Additional custom identity variables. Must be uppercase with underscores.

substitutions.description: Map of upstream placeholder token name to the fork's resolved value. Variable names must match those in scripts/setup-template.sh. During sync, {{TOKEN}} in upstream files is replaced with the corresponding value. Derived values (TICKET_PREFIX_LOWER, AUTHOR_INITIALS, GITHUB_REPO_URL, HARNESS_VERSION) are computed automatically unless overridden here.

renames.description: Map of upstream path (relative to .claude/) to local path (relative to .claude/). Use trailing '/' to indicate directory renames. File renames take precedence over directory renames when both match.

propertyNames.description: Upstream path relative to .claude/. Must not start with / or contain ..

protected.description: Glob patterns (relative to .claude/) that the sync script must NEVER overwrite. These files are completely skipped during sync.

items.description: Glob pattern relative to .claude/. Supports *, **, and ? wildcards.

replaced.description: Paths (relative to .claude/) that the fork has completely rewritten. These are not overwritten during sync, but the sync script warns if the upstream version has changed since last sync.

sync.description: Sync behavior preferences. All fields have sensible defaults.

auto_substitute.description: Automatically apply substitutions from identity/substitutions to incoming upstream files during sync.

backup.description: Create a timestamped backup of .claude/ before each sync.

conflict_strategy.description: Strategy for resolving conflicts when both upstream and local have changed a file since last sync.

substitution_extensions.description: File extensions that substitutions are applied to. Non-matching files are copied verbatim (binary safety).
